finalSummary:
# Weekly Self-Improvement Performance Review
**Window:** 2026-03-08 to 2026-03-15  
**Run date:** 2026-03-15

## Summary
This was a noisy but revealing week. The strongest pattern is that Prom performs well when scheduled jobs have **tight prompts, concrete outputs, and one clear tool path**, but degrades when jobs rely on **placeholder HEARTBEATs, weak verification, or “say done” style completion language**. Formal self-improvement telemetry is still sparse, so the best evidence came from task
